version_notes: v1.0.0 adds cover-letter as the 7th job-hunter family member, closing a real gap (the family had zero cover-letter capability). Drafts a posting-tailored cover letter from the user's confirmed profile/resume facts via draft_cover_letter.py, then routes the draft through the family's verify_no_fabrication gate (bundled byte-identical from resume-tailor) so no claim/number/employer is invented. Persuasive prose is allowed; new facts are not. Never auto-sends. Works standalone or routed by the orchestrator after resume-tailor.
